data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the reissue flow for legitimate customer support cases.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for the reissue flow for legitimate customer support cases. However, the provided evidence does not include any API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions the need for a controlled reissue logged as a support action, there is no direct evidence of its implementation or testing in the prior steps, leading to an inconclusive validation.
gaps: No evidence of the reissue flow for legitimate customer support cases being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the reissue flow for legitimate customer support cases.
